{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart of Nakothi
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Heart of Nakothi Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]], also known as [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]], is a gray-green, fist-sized organ belonging to the [[Great Elder]] known as the [[Dead Mother]]. It is a powerful and dangerous remnant of [[Nakothi]]'s [[essence]] that possesses its own conscious will and can emit a deafening, melodic song. The [[Heart]] is capable of exerting immense influence over those near it, often driving them toward madness or compelling them to prostrate themselves before its superior power. It has the potential to transform living beings into [[Children of Nakothi]] and, if destroyed without first being properly weakened or drained of its power, could release a catastrophic surge of intent that might kill and resurrect entire populations. Historically, the [[Heart]] was used by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to achieve a form of immortality, though staying in its proximity required incredible willpower to stave off insanity. The object is highly coveted for its immense power, serving as a significant bargaining chip for freedom or a tool for various factions. It has been kept in pewter cages, stone boxes, and belt-pouches, and its strength can fluctuate or grow over time. While it is one of several such hearts belonging to the [[Dead Mother]], its presence is often associated with a signature of icy, nauseating sensation and an insatiable hunger.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]] is a vile artifact belonging to the [[Dead Mother]] that functions as an organ capable of squirting gray-green blood. This singing object can be bonded with, though it possesses the power to erode the mind and pry at a [[Reader]]'s senses. While many seek the [[Heart]] to crown or bind a new [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]], the current [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] managed to keep the artifact at bay for over fifteen hundred years. During recent events, the [[Chronicler]] was seen clutching the [[Heart]], which had grown stronger since its last sighting by [[Calder]]. Although the [[Consultants]] intended to destroy the object, [[Naberius Clayborn]] raised it into the air before its influence eroded his mind, eventually leading to [[Shera]] taking possession of it.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is the heart of the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object used to raise or bind an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Chronicler]] was clutching the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an organ that squirts gray-green blood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object that people want to use to crown a new [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart]] is an artifact of [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]] kept the [[Heart of Nakothi]] at bay for over one and a half thousand years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is considered indispensable for the crew's escape from the gallows.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object that the [[Consultants]] intend to destroy.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] has grown stronger since [[Calder]] last saw it.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object that sings and can be bonded with.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object [[Naberius Clayborn]] raises into the air.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a vile organ that erodes the mind and pries at [[Reader’s senses]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] took the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] eroded [[Naberius]]' mind.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]] is a fist-sized, pulsing mass characterized by its sickly gray color and green veins that pump sludge. While [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] has used this still-beating organ for centuries to achieve immortality, the [[Blackwatch]] has actively hunted the object. During a mission to retrieve or destroy it, [[Shera]] and [[Meia]] encounter [[Watchmen]] digging at the [[Heart]] as it is being cut free from its bonds. Held by [[Calder Marten]], the object laughs with distant malice and croons whispered messages to those nearby. Although it can be restrained by invested rags or kept in a pewter cage, destroying the [[Heart]] without draining its power risks releasing [[Nakothi]]'s will and potentially killing or resurrecting everyone on the [[island]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is described as a gray heart with veins of green that pumps sludge.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch]] is hunting for the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object [[Shera]] wants to keep buried.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] is a target of mining.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] is an object that [[Shera]] and [[Meia]] are on a mission to retrieve or destroy.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] is a pulsing, gray-green mass the size of a fist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Watchmen]] were digging at [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] wants to prevent a [[Heart of Nakothi]] from escaping into the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is being cut free from its bonds.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The characters are present to protect [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object held by [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a pulsing object that laughs with distant malice.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]] used the [[Heart of Nakothi]] for centuries without ill effects.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] can be destroyed by a left-hand shear invested with enough [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Destroying the [[Heart]] without draining its power releases [[Nakothi]]'s will.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Destroying the [[Heart]] might kill and resurrect everyone on the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a sickly, gray-green, still-beating heart that allows [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to live forever.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] has a song that can be heard and croons messages to those nearby.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] is an object that whispers.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] spews whispers from a closed chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is kept in a pewter cage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is kept in a box.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] can be bound with rags that are invested to restrain power.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]] clutches the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]] was first described by [[Jerri]] as a comparison for a mass of gray-green flesh. During the events of the story, [[Calder]] threw the object into the sea before later delivering it. Ultimately, the [[Heart]] was utilized in a debacle and served as a component in the construction of the organism created by [[Kelarac]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a concept or object that [[Jerri]] compares a mass of gray-green flesh to.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] threw [[Nakothi]]’s [[Heart]] into the sea.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] was used to build the organism [[Kelarac]] created.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] was involved in a debacle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an object that [[Calder]] delivered.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Although the [[Consultants]] have been aware of the [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]] for many years, the entity unexpectedly vanished. This mysterious object possesses a voice similar to [[Syphren]]'s and croons a terrible song while whispering of its desire to be reborn. [[Calder Marten]] eventually assisted in unearthing a second [[Heart]] of [[Nakothi]], which serves as a component capable of resurrecting [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] through the power of the [[Dead Mother]]. However, there remains a danger that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] might lose himself to the influence of the [[Heart]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] have known about the [[Heart of Nakothi]] for years.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] has vanished.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] might lose himself to the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Syphren]]'s voice is similar to the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Calder Marten]] helped unearth the second [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] is a component that can bring [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] back to [[life]] via the [[Dead Mother]]'s power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is an entity that croons a terrible song and whispers to be reborn.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]] used a [[Heart of Nakothi]] to maintain his [[life]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] might be speaking through [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] was stabbed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera's shears]] hold [[Elder Intent]] from the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a lump of gray-green flesh.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Another Heart of Nakothi. We can’t very well raise a mortal man Emperor, can we?"<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“I’m sure you remember the last person who try to mine for a Heart of Nakothi,” Meia said.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Revealing a sickly, gray-green, still-beating heart. “This,” the Emperor said, “is a Heart of Nakothi. This is how I live forever.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“We’ve known about the Heart of Nakothi for years,” Yala said, tapping two fingers against her collarbone.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
